skipReason: Prefect MCP server requires a connection to a Prefect server or Prefect Cloud instance. Prefect Cloud requires an API key (PREFECT_API_KEY) and API URL (PREFECT_API_URL) which are paid/cloud services. While a local Prefect server could theoretically be run, the prefect-mcp package likely requires specific Prefect server APIs and configuration that make reliable automated testing impractical without a properly initialized Prefect instance with workflows and deployments.
